'''walutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miaou|miaou]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miaou|miaou]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| walutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wælitith|wælitith]] || [[word:wælitij|wælitij]] || [[word:wælitish|wælitish]] || [[word:wæliti|wæliti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:walulututh|walulututh]] || [[word:walulutuj|walulutuj]] || [[word:walulutush|walulutush]] || [[word:walulutu|walulutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:walututh|walututh]] || [[word:walutuj|walutuj]] || [[word:walutush|walutush]] || [[word:walutu|walutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:waluftuth|waluftuth]] || [[word:waluftuj|waluftuj]] || [[word:waluftush|waluftush]] || [[word:waluftuf|waluftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:walututhu|walututhu]] || [[word:walutuju|walutuju]] || [[word:walutushu|walutushu]] || [[word:walutuku|walutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:walututh|walututh]] || [[word:walutuj|walutuj]] || [[word:walutush|walutush]] || [[word:walutu|walutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:walututhul|walututhul]] || [[word:walutujul|walutujul]] || [[word:walutushul|walutushul]] || [[word:walutukul|walutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:walututhuthu|walututhuthu]] || [[word:walutujuju|walutujuju]] || [[word:walutushushu|walutushushu]] || [[word:walutuku|walutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:walututhun|walututhun]] || [[word:walutujun|walutujun]] || [[word:walutushun|walutushun]] || [[word:walutukun|walutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:walututhuoro|walututhuoro]] || [[word:walutujuoro|walutujuoro]] || [[word:walutushuoro|walutushuoro]] || [[word:walutukuoro|walutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
